versions.version_description: Riptide by Vance Joy. Link for song- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uJ_1HMAGb4k .

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Riptide - Vance Joy

Capo 6

[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Dadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Dadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Dadd9[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I was scared of dentists and the dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Dadd9[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I was scared of pretty girls and starting conversations[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Dadd9[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, all my friends are turning green[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Dadd9[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
You're the magician's assistant in their dream[/tab]

[Interlude]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Dadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Uh oooh oooh  oooh[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Dadd9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Uh oooh oooh and they come unstuck[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Dadd9[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Lady, runnin' down to the riptide[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Taken away to the dark side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna be your left hand man[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Dadd9[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
And I love you when you're singin' that song and[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
I gotta lump in my throat 'cause[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
You're gonna sing the words wrong[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Dadd9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
There's this movie that I think you'll like[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Dadd9[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
This guy decides to quit his job and head to New York City[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Dadd9[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
This cowboy's running from himself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Dadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
She's been living on the highest shelf[/tab]

[Interlude]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Dadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][Interlude]
e|-----------------|

D|-----------5-----|

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
I just wanna, I just wanna know[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
If you're gonna, if you're gonna stay[/tab]

I just gotta, I just gotta know[/tab]

I can't have it, I can't have it any other way[/tab]
